title: Community rallies for Bird Lady
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Beloved local animal rescuer...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Beloved local animal rescuer Tanja Badenhorst, known throughout Knysna and George as \"the Bird Lady\", is facing a critical medical crisis and urgently needs help from the community she's served for years.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Beloved local animal rescuer Tanja Badenhorst, known throughout Knysna and George as \"the Bird Lady\", is facing a critical medical crisis and urgently needs help from the community she's served for years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"For the past six years, Tanja has been battling chronic osteomyelitis, a severe and recurring bone infection,\" says her wife, Ashleigh de Wit.","html":"\"For the past six years, Tanja has been battling chronic osteomyelitis, a severe and recurring bone infection,\" says her wife, Ashleigh de Wit."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"She's already endured over 75 surgeries, lost her left leg above the knee, and continues to suffer daily pain. Just a month ago, she received the devastating news that the infection has returned, now in her bone marrow. Government hospitals have a five-month wait - and we simply don't have that time.\"","html":"\"She's already endured over 75 surgeries, lost her left leg above the knee, and continues to suffer daily pain. Just a month ago, she received the devastating news that the infection has returned, now in her bone marrow. Government hospitals have a five-month wait - and we simply don't have that time.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Ashleigh says private surgeons believe her leg can still be partially saved without a high-risk full hip disarticulation, but the surgery must happen urgently."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The cost, including hospital care and specialists, is R400 000. We've raised R154 000 through BackaBuddy, which secured a surgery date - 29 July - but we still have a long way to go. We've spent over R300 000 of our own savings. We're emotionally exhausted, financially broken, and desperate.\"","html":"\"The cost, including hospital care and specialists, is R400 000. We've raised R154 000 through BackaBuddy, which secured a surgery date - 29 July - but we still have a long way to go. We've spent over R300 000 of our own savings. We're emotionally exhausted, financially broken, and desperate.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ashleigh is calling on the people of Knysna and George to rally behind the woman who has given so much to local wildlife.","html":"Ashleigh is calling on the people of Knysna and George to rally behind the woman who has given so much to local wildlife."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To donate, visit their BackaBuddy campaign or contact Ashleigh on 076 410 6441.","html":"To donate, visit their BackaBuddy campaign or contact Ashleigh on 076 410 6441."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
